pages.text: A guidebook recording the knowledge of animal companionship.$(br2)As long as it is carried in the inventory, main hand, or off hand, it helps protect certain animals.
pages.title: Guide to Animal Companionship

pages.text: The guidebook protects certain animals, especially ordinary animals and some tamable creatures.$(br2)It also weakens the impact of the second curse of the Ring of the Seven Curses on tamable animals.
pages.title: Animal Protection

pages.text: Creative mode players can right-click a creature with this book to check whether it is treated as a tamable animal.$(br2)This is mainly useful for debugging and compatibility checks.
pages.title: Creative Check
